main.description: Create a single new record in the caller's permissioned repo for a space. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

collection.description: The NSID of the record collection.

validate.description: Can be set to 'false' to skip Lexicon schema validation of record data, 'true' to require it, or leave unset to validate only for known Lexicons.

record.description: The record itself. Must contain a $type field.

uri.description: Permissioned record URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}/{authorDid}/{collection}/{rkey}. Not a standard at-uri.
